text-and-ocr-analyzer.description: Extracts and verifies text rendered in images to accurately evaluate text-addition prompts.

reasoning-preference-alignment.description: Ensures the final preference strictly matches the reasoning and assigned scores.

mandatory-ocr-for-text.description: Mandates the use of the text-and-ocr-analyzer tool for any text-related prompts.

world-knowledge-and-style-awareness.description: Guidance on evaluating prompts that reference specific artists, styles, or cultural entities.
